appliedUpdates.description: VAL-CROSS-001 re-evaluated under correct executed-attribution semantics: excluded ATS entries with zero counters and explicit warnings are valid skip evidence, not violations

summary: Round 2 user-testing for end-to-end-validation-hardening milestone. All 11 assertions now PASS. VAL-CROSS-001 re-evaluated using orchestrator-specified executed-attribution semantics: browser_only preset correctly excludes ATS lanes with zero counters (leadsSeen=0, leadsAccepted=0) and explicit 'excluded by preset' warnings. Fresh run (run_eb11e5071b984b33b6e27232f7e97a98) confirms no ATS-attributed outputs. VAL-DATA-001-005 and VAL-CROSS-002-006 continue to PASS from round 1.
